title: FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINE FINDER - 211info
text: CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINE FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an online map of flu shot and COVID-19 vaccination locations searchable by zip code. Most sites listed are pharmacies. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (800) 232-4636 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 232-4636 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies. Most sites accept insurance. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: COVID-19 Immunization Clinics Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information * COVID-19 Vaccine Information * Seasonal Flu Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - NATURAL DISASTERS AND SEVERE WEATHER EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MILESTONES HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - COVID-19 NO COST TESTING INFORMATION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - GET PREP PUBLIC HEALTH - CDC NATIONAL PREVENTION INFORMATION NETWORK SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRAVELERS' HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION
